scripts.dev:clean: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/kill-all.ps1 && npm run dev
scripts.dev: npm run kill && npx concurrently -n be,el -c green,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:noel: npx concurrently -n fe,be -c cyan,green "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.build:backend: echo "Python backend does not require a build step"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.electron:start: npm run dev:frontend & npx wait-on http-get://localhost:4000 http-get://127.0.0.1:8000/docs && npx electron .
scripts.clean: rm -rf frontend/.next dist-electron && echo "Cleaned build artifacts"

build.dev:clean: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/kill-all.ps1 && npm run dev
build.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
build.build:backend: echo "Python backend does not require a build step"
build.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
